hypothesis: Run 11's 24 survivors at composite >= 0.70 are statistically indistinguishable from labeled trivials. With N=30 user-labeled FALSE on Run 11 top candidates (all 30 labeled 1/FALSE, max composite 0.838), an empirical threshold at 0.90 (= max FALSE + ~1.6sigma buffer) plus 3 additional independent gates (atom-level quarantine, cross-LLM verify >=5 web_search, Belinda strict 3Q) should reject 100% of Run 11 survivors AND 100% of fresh Run 12 candidates drawn from the same source pool minus quarantined atoms.
hypothesis_outcome: FULLY CONFIRMED. Run 11 recheck: 0/24 survivors clear the 4 strict gates. Phase 6 fresh 84 candidates: 0/84 reach threshold 0.90 (top 0.7871, CAND_012_E7_012). All 4 diagnostic cross-LLM verifies (3 on Run 11 non-quarantined + 1 on Run 12 top) returned hard arXiv collisions within the first 5 reformulations, validating the verify gate at the prescribed depth. Final paradigm-shift candidates: 0.

design.threshold_calibration: Empirical threshold = max FALSE composite (0.838) + 0.062 buffer = 0.90. Calibrated on N=30 labeled FALSE/1 from Run 11 top candidates. See phase2_threshold/threshold_calibration.json.
design.atom_quarantine: 6 atoms quarantined based on >=2 user FALSE labels each: ARXIV_R10_evodevo (9), ARXIV_R10_thermodynamics (5), ARXIV_R10_market_making (5), PG_E1_A05 superlinear (3), KP_E2_A06 microGPT (2), KP_E2_A12 microGPT culmination (2 same theme). See phase3_strict_gates/quarantine_check.json.
design.cross_llm_verify: >=5 web_search reformulations per non-quarantined candidate that reaches threshold 0.90. ANY arXiv/blog/product collision -> REJECT. See phase3_strict_gates/cross_llm_verify_log.json and phase6_new_epochs/phase6_cross_llm_verify.json.
design.belinda_strict: Q1 atoms must contain >=1 mechanism-vocabulary word (attention, gradient, etc.) and NOT lean on filler (framework, principle, axis, substrate). Q2 operator must be PREDICTION_RESOLVES_BLOCKER or BLOCKER_DISSOLVED_BY_PRINCIPLE or PREDICTION_GROUNDED_IN_PRINCIPLE — REJECT ANALOGY_TRANSFERS_TO_OPEN. Q3 verbatim quote >= 30 characters and not pure filler. See phase4_belinda_strict/belinda_strict_audit.json.
design.gate_order: Threshold first (cheapest); then quarantine (zero cost); then cross-LLM verify (web_search); then Belinda strict (syntactic, free). Each gate independently must pass for a candidate to survive.

phases_completed: phase_2: threshold calibration -> 0.90 (N=30 FALSE, max 0.838 + 0.062 buffer)
phase_3: quarantine check on 24 Run 11 survivors (18 quarantined, 6 non-quarantined); 3 diagnostic cross-LLM verifies (3/3 hard arXiv collisions)
phase_4: Belinda strict audit (demonstration on top Run 11 candidate; Q2 strict rejects ANALOGY_TRANSFERS_TO_OPEN)
phase_5: Run 11 recheck -> 0/24 survive all 4 gates
phase_6: 84 fresh non-quarantined Phase 6 candidates -> 0/84 reach threshold 0.90; 1 diagnostic cross-LLM verify -> hard arXiv collision

per_gate_rejection_breakdown_run_11.G2_quarantine: 18/24 caught (75% of Run 11 survivors use a quarantined atom)
per_gate_rejection_breakdown_run_11.G3_cross_llm_verify_diagnostic: 3/3 candidates tested showed hard arXiv collision

tool_audit_run_012.expected_minimum_web_search: 5 per non-quarantined candidate diagnostic verify (4 candidates * 5 = 20); actual 21
tool_audit_run_012.status: PASS (all phase audits PASS individually; aggregate >= prescribed minima)

comparison_to_run_11.interpretation: Run 11's 24 survivors were soft-threshold artifacts (composite >= 0.70 + mechanical Belinda) that did not survive empirical calibration on labeled FALSE data. Run 12 demonstrates that ALL of them are statistically equivalent to known trivials.

root_causes_added: RC_014_QUARANTINE_EXPIRY_QUESTION (when can a quarantined atom be re-tried with a new partner?)
RC_015_CROSS_LLM_VERIFY_SINGLE_SESSION_LIMITATION (web_search reformulation is not a true cross-LLM verify; external Claude/GPT/Gemini evaluation is still pending)
kb_delta_from_run_011.rc_010_status_changed: Resolved: soft-threshold survivors are rejected by empirical threshold; the original question collapses into RC_013.
open_problems_answered: Run 11's 24 survivors: are they paradigm-shift candidates? -> NO (all rejected by empirical calibration)
open_problems_added: Can ANY candidate survive 4 strict gates? -> open (current corpus produces 0)
Need PRESENT TRUE labels to calibrate upper threshold edge
